card_name_verified: Amazon Business Prime American Express Card
card_status_alert: Issuer transition: Amex co-brand ending Aug 14, 2026 — replacement card will be issued by U.S. Bank starting spring 2026.
_review_reason: No documented unconditional $ statement credits. Card is rewards-focused (5% Amazon/AWS/Whole Foods on first $120k). Amex Venue Collection 10% F&B is referenced as Amex-member-wide perk but NOT listed on card-specific benefits page (unlike Plum which had it explicitly). Other features qualitative: Amex Offers, baggage insurance, car rental insurance, Global Assist Hotline.
